feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cap app - accessing endpoint using destination giving unauthorized(Oauth2clientcredentials)
entry.content:
Trying to call a URL using destination. It is setup as OAuth2ClientCredentials with token url, client id and client secret.

It works from postman and also from test.http by getting bearer token.

But if called from BTP destination in CAP app - it does'nt work. It is returning - Unauthorized when run in debug or from terminal.

entry.title: Communication Arrangement Check Connection Failed
entry.content:
Hello, 

 I am following the tutorial  to read values from On premise system into ABAP Cloud.    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-env-rfc.html

At the Step 8 Create Communication Arrangement . when i click on the Check connection. I am getting the message as The ping of the outbound service has failed.

1. In the Communication Systems --> General --> Host Name is same as the hostname that comes up in the browser when i run the transaction /ui2/flp  

 

2.  The Target Host Is same as the Destination Configuration -> URL < Host Name >

3. I checked the user credentials in the on premise system and the user credentials provided in Communication Systems --> Users for Outbound Communication  are the same. The same credentials are used in Cloud Connector also.   

4. When I Check the connection from Communication Arrangement . I am getting the error saying The ping of the outbound service has failed. In the error log it says the issue is in the service APS_COM_CA2_SRV .

Please help me resolve this issue. Also, Is there any better approach to connect to on premises S4HANA system . Thanks for your time and help.

entry.title: How to create application test users without s-account info - SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few RAP Application in BTP ABAP and would like to test these apps using test users. 

Can we able to create some users without s-account ?

Note: this is for productive account not for trail account

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Service Registration in SAP Gateway is disabled
entry.content:
Hey,

I've created  project in SEGW with CDS.

and I generated it - 

Now, I want to register it but it's disabled.

I tried to create service in tcode:  /n/iwfnd/maint_Service.

I assume , that now this service should show up in the SEGW and then relate it.

But, it's not showing up.

Please advice how to continue from this point.

Thank you.

entry.title: Simulate creation of RFQ using RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

Previously, we are using BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2 to simulate the creation of the quotation. When using the RAP BO(https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_REQUESTFORQUOTATIONTP), do we have any equivalent functionality? Like if there are during the MODIFY ENTITIES statement, we can call the ROLLBACK ENTITIES? Or is there an equivalent operation/API to do this?

entry.title: ABAP on BTP Trial Instance creation is getting Failed
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create ABAP instance in BTP Trial account.I have tried deleting entire trial account. But nothing helps.

I am getting following error:

Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error.

 

Tried creating via Booster then deleted whole Subaccount ,Space everything again tried to creating through Service market place still failing,

I was able to create successfully two days back and today that instance was currently not available.So tried recreating and ended up getting failed.

 

 

 

 

Please help.

entry.title: Creating Dynamic Parameters in Fiori's Application Job App
entry.content:
I have a report which i want to schedule as a background job with the Application Job App in Fiori Launchpad. 

In the SAP GUI i have created so far the application job catalog entry and the application job template. The parameters from the report were synchronized automatically. However, in the report when I look at it in the SAP GUI there is a parameter which is a drop down fields and depending on the value selected in the drop down field, different fields appear. Is there a way to achieve that in the Application Job App UI in Fiori Launchpad? Maybe with check classes?

entry.title: Problem with creating of a Service Instance for an ABAP development (BTP)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently facing an issue while creating a service instance, which is preventing me from generating a Service Key for ABAP development on the BTP Cockpit Cloud.

Initially, I attempted an automatic process to create the service instance, but unfortunately, it failed. Consequently, I decided to create it manually, but encountered the same problem. Regrettably, there are no specific error details provided, leaving me uncertain about the root cause and the necessary steps for resolution.

Then I tried to delete all my registered attempts one by one, but it failed as well. 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? If so, any insights or technical guidance would be greatly appreciated. I’ve also explored various forum posts related to this problem, but unfortunately, none of them provided useful information concerning my particular problem.

For context, I’ve attached some screenshots to help illustrate the situation.

Thank you in advance for your assistance

 

1.

2.

entry.title: Trying to access SAP HANA DB from SAP ABAP on Cloud
entry.content:
HI,

I am trying to access a few tables in HANA DB from a program in my ABAP Cloud, but am unable to access the tables in the DB. I get the following error  (Error: "CW_ACTIVITY" is not declared as a table, projection view, or database view in ABAP Dictionary or does not exist in an active version.)

I reached out to SAP for help, but as the ABAP version procured for the system is a trial version it was not of much help. Can someone kindly tell me whether it is possible to connect to ABAP(trial) cloud via HANA DB and if so how to do the same?

Thanks for the help.

Regards,

Rohith Ramesh

entry.title: Error when trying to create a package in Eclipe - ABAP Cloud BTP
entry.content:
Hello everybody,
I have the following error when trying to create a package in Eclipe connected to SAP BTP: System setting does not allow changes to be made to object DEVC.

Can someone help me please?

Thanks

entry.title: CAP or RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I'm a SAP ABAP developer, I well trained in SAP UI5, OData and ABAP. For my future career opportunities what should I choose CAP or RAP which is going to be enlarged in future business perceptions. 

Need your advice. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am getting this weird error : You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during fetching the Service Instance's SAP System ID.

As i refered atleast 10 different blogs and solutions but still not able to resolve this issue

Simply, I have created abap enviroinment and try to create abap cloud project in ADT , But ending up getting this error.

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

Screenshots : 

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Eclipse GitHub Repositiry 421 error
entry.content:
I have created a package in Eclipse for ABAP RAP. I am trying to upload them in the github. While linking the repostory, I get HTTP 421 error. 

 

Can someone help me with this?

HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)
Peer's X.509 certificate (chain) validation failed (missing

entry.title: How to show value help with values for Application Job parameters - BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created Application Job Catalog Entries & Application Job Templates with two Selection parameters. I want to have this parameters a value help values so users can select from popup. In the Job Catalog entry, I have defined Value help exit class with Implemented interface IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT. How can I populate the value help values for these two parameters ?

I didn't find any blog/documentation related to this.

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-jobs-2?locale=zh-CNstate%3DPRODUCTION

@FrankJentsch  @Andre_Fischer  - Could you please help me here ? The Value help exit is available in the Job Catalog entries but when I populate some values in the class it doesn't visible in the F4 Help dialog

 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Use Custom Business Object Data for CDS Views in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello together, 

i have following use case: I need to use some of the fields of my custom business object in Eclipse to create a new view and do further calculations with these values. I have already maintained the catalogues for the CBO and created an other cds view on the basis of the CBO like a workaround, but it did not help. I always get the error in Eclipse IDE that the usage of the CDS-Entity is not allowed.

Is there a possible solution for this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Development Objects are not permitted in ABAP Environment(BTP) | Excel Upload and Processing of Data
entry.content:
Use case:
I use the RAP model to build an app on the BTP in which I can upload an Excel file. The upload saves the Excel in hexadecimal format in a table.
The aim is now to convert the data into a "readable" form. Then the data should be saved in an internal table for further processing in the backend.

I can already manage the conversion on the on-premise system. Below you will find the coding of how I get from the raw string (hexadecimal format of Excel) to my internal table.

 

 

    TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_uploadFile,
              col1 TYPE String,
              col2 TYPE String,
              col3 TYPE String,
            END OF gty_uploadFile.

    TYPES gty_uploadFile_tt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gty_uploadFile.

    TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_uploadFileStructured,
              col1 TYPE vkorg,
              col2 TYPE matnr,
              col3 TYPE char250,
            END OF gty_uploadFileStructured.
    TYPES gty_uploadFileStructured_tt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gty_uploadfilestructured.

    DATA gt_uploadFileStructured TYPE gty_uploadFileStructured_tt.


SELECT SINGLE FROM table_excel
    FIELDS attachment
    WHERE document_id = 1
    INTO (iv_exceldata). "hexadecimal format of excel

   DATA(lt_binary_data) = CL_BCS_CONVERT=>XSTRING_TO_SOLIX(
    EXPORTING
        iv_xstring = iv_exceldata
		).

    DATA(go_spreadsheet) = NEW cl_fdt_xl_spreadsheet(
         document_name = CONV #( 'testname' )
         xdocument     = cl_bcs_convert=>solix_to_xstring( it_solix = lt_binary_data ) 
	       ).

    go_spreadsheet->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_worksheet_names(
      IMPORTING worksheet_names = DATA(gt_worksheetNames) 
      ).

    IF lines( gt_worksheetNames ) > 0.
      DATA(go_worksheet_itab) = go_spreadsheet->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_itab_from_worksheet(
                                    worksheet_name = gt_worksheetNames[ 1 ] ).

      FIELD-SYMBOLS <gt_worksheet> TYPE gty_uploadFile_tt.
      ASSIGN go_worksheet_itab->* TO <gt_worksheet>.

      LOOP AT <gt_worksheet> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<gs_worksheet_line>).
        IF sy-tabix = 1.
          CONTINUE.
        ENDIF.

        APPEND VALUE gty_uploadfilestructured( 
           col1 = <gs_worksheet_line>-col1
           col2 = |{ <gs_worksheet_line>-col2 ALPHA = IN }|
           col3 = <gs_worksheet_line>-col3 ) 
        TO gt_uploadFileStructured.
         
       ENDLOOP.

     out->write( gt_uploadfilestructured ).
      
    ENDIF.

 


But now to my problem. I cannot use some of the objects on the BTP because I get the following error messages:
- The use of Class CL_BCS_CONVERT is not permitted.
- The use of Class CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET is not permitted.
- The use of Interface IF_FDT_DOC_SPREADSHEET is not permitted.

I can see why this is the case and that these classes are not suitable for the cloud. However, after extensive research, I could not find an alternative that works on the cloud.

So my question is: Is there an alternative for these classes and the interface that works for the BTP?

I look forward to your support!

Best regards,
Fabio

entry.title: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content:
Dear ABAP Cloud Experts,

Currently I am working in migrating the Old BW flows to BW Bridge.We have many SE38 programs and Include programs in BW System. But while moving the programs from BW system -> GITHUB -> BW Bridge Cloud system. The Programs are not able to move and I am getting the message as

Object type PROG not supported in SAP Cloud Platform, ABAP Environment. The import of this object is skipped.

Could you please guide me, what is the replacement of SE38 programs and include programs in ABAP Cloud.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to upload huge records from Excel to Database table in Eclipse.
entry.content:
Dear ABAP Cloud Experts,

I am in the process of uploading 1 Lakh record to the database table in Eclipse from the excel. I have seen many blogs where we can upload the data using the ABAP code. Could you please guide me, how to achieve this without Coding.

Thanks.

entry.title: ABAP RAP Generator - Repository objects are not generating
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am facing an issue on ABAP on Cloud Trail Environment. I have been trying generate  ABAP Repository objects for a Table by using "RAP Generator". It was working fine previously however it is showing the blank. 

If I remember correctly last time we had similar issue and it was bug from Eclipse side and later it was working fine. 

Has any one recent times facing similar issue. I have attached the screenshot for the reference. 

 

Thanks and Regards,

Bharani

entry.title: Call browser based on ABAP RAP Action
entry.content:
Hello

I need to call browser for eg. http://www.sap.com when the user clicks the action button created from ABAP RAP. I do not want this to be done from SAPUI5 based development. Please let know if this is possible. I have tried calling CALL_BROWSER FM and it did not work.

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim
